item.title: Swiggy Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 11 May 2026
item.description: Swiggy Ltd’s shares declined sharply on 11 May 2026, touching an intraday low of ₹261.2, marking a 6.98% drop from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader market, reflecting persistent selling pressure amid a broadly negative market environment. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Dalmia Bharat Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Price Action
item.description: Dalmia Bharat Ltd (DALBHARAT), a mid-cap player in the Cement & Cement Products sector, has witnessed a notable 10.05% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s recent underperformance. This increase in open interest, coupled with falling prices and rising volumes, suggests a shift in market positioning that may indicate bearish sentiment among traders. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Strong Market Momentum
item.description: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd (MCX) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market participation and potential directional bets. The stock hit a fresh 52-week high of Rs 3,215.4 on 11 May 2026, outperforming its sector and broader indices amid rising volumes and sustained investor interest. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Lupin Ltd. Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Volatile Derivatives Activity
item.description: Lupin Ltd., a mid-cap player in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector, has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a recent price decline, the stock’s derivatives market shows signs of increased speculative interest, raising questions about potential directional bets and future price movements. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: March 2026 Results Show Broad Improvement Across Market Caps
item.description: The March 2026 quarter earnings season has revealed a marked improvement in corporate profitability across Indian markets, with 738 companies reporting results. Positive earnings surprises surged to 59.0%, a significant jump from 46.0% in the preceding quarter, signalling a broad-based recovery led by mid-cap stocks and select small caps. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Paramount Communications Ltd Sees Exceptional Volume Surge Amid Strong Price Rally
item.description: Paramount Communications Ltd (PARACABLES), a micro-cap player in the Cables - Electricals sector, has witnessed a remarkable surge in trading volume and price momentum, outperforming its sector and broader market indices. The stock’s recent rally, coupled with heightened investor participation, signals a potential shift in market sentiment for this cable manufacturer. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Midcap Segment Faces Pressure as BSE MIDCAP 150 Declines 0.97%
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE Midcap 150 index, experienced a notable decline of 0.97% on 11 May 2026, reflecting broad-based weakness across the sector. Market breadth was decidedly negative, with 115 stocks declining against just 35 advancing, resulting in a subdued advance-decline ratio of 0.3x. Despite the overall downturn, select stocks such as Vodafone Idea bucked the trend with a robust return of 7.29%, while others like Kalyan Jewellers faced steep losses of 8.14%. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Ltd. has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, accompanied by robust volume activity and sustained price gains. This development highlights a potential shift in market positioning and directional bets, signalling renewed investor confidence in the pharmaceutical giant amid a backdrop of sector outperformance and strong technical indicators. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Pressure as BSE 100 Declines Amid Mixed Stock Performances
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, experienced a modest decline of 1.07% on 11 May 2026, continuing a subdued trend with a 0.21% drop over the past five trading sessions. Despite the overall weakness, select heavyweight stocks demonstrated divergent performances, highlighting a clear split between defensive and cyclical sectors within the large-cap universe. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex Dips Over 900 Points as Market Breadth Weakens; Healthcare Sector Shines
item.description: Indian equity markets closed lower on 11 May 2026, with the Sensex ending the day down 1.17% at 76,422.61, reflecting persistent selling pressure across most sectors. Despite the broad decline, the healthcare sector bucked the trend, hitting a fresh 52-week high, while small caps remained largely flat amid cautious investor sentiment ahead of key corporate earnings. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Broad Weakness Amid Mixed Stock Performances
item.description: The BSE Smallcap 250 index declined by 0.75% on 11 May 2026, reflecting a cautious mood among investors as the small-cap segment experienced broad-based weakness. Despite the overall downturn, select stocks such as Affle 3i bucked the trend with robust gains, while others like Jyothy Labs faced significant losses. Market breadth indicators reveal a pronounced imbalance, with declining stocks far outnumbering advancing ones, signalling underlying sectoral pressures and investor risk aversion. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Marico Ltd. Hits All-Time High of Rs 842 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Marico Ltd., a prominent player in the edible oil sector, has reached an all-time high share price on 11 May 2026, underscoring its robust market performance and sustained growth trajectory. This milestone reflects the company’s strong fundamentals and consistent financial discipline over recent years. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Kartik Investments Trust Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 8,416.60 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Extending a remarkable winning streak to 21 sessions, Kartik Investments Trust Ltd surged 5% today to touch a fresh all-time high of Rs 8,416.60, significantly outpacing the Sensex which declined 1.05% on the same day. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Affle 3i Ltd Surges 8.95% to Day's High of Rs 1628.75 — Outperforms Sector by 5.9 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 1.07% on 11 May 2026, while Affle 3i Ltd surged 8.95%, outperforming its sector by nearly 6 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market, raising the question of whether this rally signals a sustained recovery or a technical bounce within a mixed trend. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Tasty Bite Eatables Ltd Opens 6.16% Lower as Technicals Signal Mixed Momentum
item.description: Tasty Bite Eatables Ltd witnessed a sharp gap down at the opening bell on 11 May 2026, reflecting heightened market apprehension. The stock opened 6.16% lower, marking a notable reversal after a five-day rally, and underperformed its FMCG sector peers as well as the broader market indices. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Kartik Investments Trust Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 8416.6
item.description: Surging to an all-time high of Rs 8416.6 on 11 May 2026, Kartik Investments Trust Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, extending gains for 21 consecutive trading sessions and delivering a staggering 178.5% return over this period. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Strides Pharma Science Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1174.7
item.description: Surging past Rs 1174.7 on 11 May 2026, Strides Pharma Science Ltd has marked a significant milestone by reaching a fresh 52-week high. This achievement caps an impressive rally of 82.66% over the past year, vastly outperforming the Sensex, which declined by 3.86% in the same period. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts MIRC Electronics Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 47.15
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, MIRC Electronics Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 47.15 on 11 May 2026, marking a remarkable rally from its 52-week low of Rs 13.15. This impressive price momentum has been fuelled by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained buying interest over the past several sessions. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Arman Financial Services Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1867.15
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 1867.15 on 11 Jun 2026, Arman Financial Services Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a 28.48% gain over the past year and outpacing the Sensex’s decline of 3.83%. This milestone reflects a strong alignment of technical indicators and sustained price momentum despite a broadly weakening market backdrop. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts ADC India Communications Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 2400
item.description: With a remarkable 100.45% gain over the past year, ADC India Communications Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 2400 on 11 Jun 2026, defying the broader market's downward trend. This milestone caps a six-day winning streak that has propelled the stock up by nearly 45%, underscoring a powerful momentum driven by a confluence of technical indicators. Time: 29 minutes ago
